subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Threshold! Thy letter was received, but owing to lack of time a brief reply is being penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی نامه شما رسید ولی از عدم فرصت مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد از
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @eulogies; reminiscences
